message:
fix: correct doctor FTS rebuild SQL and add transaction safety

- Doctor rebuild referenced nonexistent columns on messages table
  (m.title, m.source_path, m.agent_id, m.workspace_id) — these live
  on conversations. Fixed JOINs and column refs to match the working
  rebuild_fts() implementations.
- Changed a.name to a.slug for consistency across all rebuild sites
- Changed w.name to w.path (correct column)
- Fixed COUNT query to use same JOINs as INSERT for accurate progress
- Wrapped DELETE + batched INSERTs in transactions for atomicity

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
